finding_results.notes: Replaced abstract order/structure rhetoric with concrete coercive constraints: a 60-second doorway-clear deadline, mandatory sequence-page handoff, Directive 14-B interference trigger, written communication restriction language, a single liaison extension/time window, explicit badge-access consequences for off-channel contact, and an arraignment/intake-log gate for any command action.

summary: Revised Clay's pressure dialogue to keep his polished paternal voice while shifting leverage from repeated institutional abstractions to specific, actionable bureaucratic controls.
